summary: Tested FIFO cost layers + price alerts feature. 9/9 backend pytest tests pass and frontend bell + panel + mark-read flow verified end-to-end as admin (hanialdujaili@gmail.com). All success criteria from problem statement are met.
critical_code_review_comments: inventory_system.py is large (>3400 lines) — consider splitting (cost layers / price alerts could move to dedicated routers).

/api/price-alerts list_price_alerts returns 200 with empty payload for non-admin users instead of 403; consistent for UX (panel just shows empty for non-admin) but inconsistent with mark-read/dismiss/mark-all-read which return 403. Acceptable.
PriceAlertsBell polls every 60s — fine for now; consider switching to websocket or react-query revalidate-on-focus to reduce stale UI.

consume_fifo helper exists but is NOT yet wired into POS sale or manufacturing transfer endpoints (deferred per problem statement). Future iteration must integrate it; otherwise cost_per_unit drift is only corrected by reconcile_layers_with_quantity helper which is also currently un-invoked.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test supplier (TEST_SUPPLIER_*) and 4 warehouse purchase requests + 4 invoices with notes 'TEST_FIFO_*' on existing material 'طماطم'. These triggered 3 new price alerts (1 critical +20%, 1 info -4%, 1 within-threshold no alert) plus added 3 cost layers for طماطم (kept tenant data structure intact). Per problem statement no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_fifo_price_alerts.py — re-runnable. The TestFIFOConsume test loads /app/backend/.env directly via dotenv. The E2E tests use the existing material id c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1 (طماطم) and rely on at least 1 active layer on it. Each run will add new layers + alerts (no cleanup). Frontend bell tested; non-admin null-render case was code-reviewed (PriceAlertsBell.js line 90 `if (!isOwner) return null;`) but not browser-tested.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature works as specified. Manual verification by main agent matches automated test results: +20% creates 1 critical alert, confirm-receipt adds layer with cost_per_unit unchanged (oldest), within 1% creates no alert, -4% creates info-severity decrease alert, FIFO consume drains oldest first and updates raw_materials.cost_per_unit to the next-oldest layer's unit_cost.
